dividends.title: Dividends
dividends.sub: Dividend distribution + dividend tax (16% from 2026, 10% transitional) — posts the 117/457/446 entry and the D100 deadline
dividends.beneficiaryTypeHint: Individuals → D100 code 604 + D205; legal entities → D100 code 150 (not in D205).
dividends.beneficiaryCnpHint: Required for declaration 205 (annual informative, per beneficiary). 13 digits with the check digit.
dividends.beneficiaryResident: Beneficiary is a Romanian tax resident
dividends.beneficiaryResidentHint: Residents are reported in D205; non-residents in D207. Ticked by default.
dividends.beneficiaryCountryHint: 2-letter ISO code (e.g. GB, DE, FR) — the Stat_R field in D207. Required for non-residents.
dividends.beneficiaryForeignTaxIdHint: The tax identification number from the country of residence (the cifS field in D207). Optional.
dividends.interim2025Hint: Tick only for dividends distributed on 2025 interim statements — the rate stays 10% even if paid in 2026 (Law 141/2025 art. VII).
dividends.confirmDelete: Delete this dividend? Its GL entry is removed too.
dividends.editHint: Correct the CNP / name / residency / type / payment date. Amounts (gross, tax) are NOT changed here — to change those, delete and re-record (the GL entry re-posts).

col.nonResidentTitle: Non-resident beneficiary — reported in D207 (emitted below), NOT in D205.

d205.title: Export D205 — annual informative declaration, per beneficiary
d205.hint: Aggregates resident dividends by CNP and emits the D205 XML (dividends chapter), validated with the official ANAF validator (DUK). Non-residents are reported separately in D207. Deadline: the last day of February of the year after the income year.
d205.previewFailed: Could not generate the D205 XML for preview.
d205.savedNoDuk: D205 saved (DUK unavailable — validate in the smart PDF): {{path}}
d205.nonResidentWarn: {{count}} dividend(s) to non-residents are NOT in D205 — they're reported separately in D207 (emitted below).

d207.title: Export D207 — annual informative, non-resident income
d207.hint: Aggregates dividends paid to non-resident beneficiaries by income type + country and emits the D207 XML (dividends chapter), validated against the official ANAF schema (XSD). Requires the country of residence on every non-resident beneficiary. Deadline: the last day of February of the year after the income year.
d207.previewFailed: Could not generate the D207 XML for preview.
d207.treatyNote: Note: D207 reports every non-resident dividend as fully taxable at the domestic rate (income code 01). Treaty-reduced rates and EU parent-subsidiary exemptions (art. 229) are not modelled yet — adjust the XML manually for those beneficiaries.
